name: Allyson Felix
title: Olympic Track & Field Sprinter
bio: American former track and field sprinter, the most decorated American track and field athlete in Olympic history with 11 Olympic medals (7 gold).
faith: A devout Christian who has spoken openly about her faith. She has said, 'My faith is everything to me. It's the foundation of who I am.' She credits God for her athletic achievements and has been vocal about trusting God through challenges.

sources.title: Allyson Felix — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the most decorated American track athlete

sources.title: Allyson Felix on Faith and Athletics
sources.note: Interviews where Felix discusses her faith

tagline: The most decorated American track Olympian who runs for Christ
